name: CV Projects
description: Section 05 — projects. 3-column responsive grid of project cards. Each card has a generated thumbnail (diagonal pattern by default, mosaic grid for size 'grid'), a title, a blurb, and chip tags. Big-size cards span all 3 columns and use a 16:10 thumb.

sub_fields.label: Card size
sub_fields.help: small = 1/3 col, big = full row + 16:10 thumb, grid = mosaic-tile thumb.

items.name: Hospital Booking System
items.blurb: Backend API + reservation system for a major hospital. Complex scheduling, patient management, real security requirements. Shipped on Kubernetes with a proper CI/CD pipeline.

items.name: Europarl Multimedia Centre
items.blurb: Frontend for the European Parliament's media platform. Multilingual, high-traffic, lots of streaming. The kind of place where things have to just work.

items.name: Plastic Surgery Clinic System
items.blurb: Full-stack booking + patient management with secure medical data handling.

items.name: Mystery Shopping Platform
items.blurb: Task management, reporting and analytics for a mystery shopping company.

items.name: Foxconn Intranet Mobile App
items.blurb: Cross-platform internal app for company comms and employee management.

items.name: 130+ WordPress & 3 Magento stores
items.blurb: The biggest chunk of the last decade. Custom themes, custom plugins, performance work on commercial sites that have to convert.
